programs.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
programs.desc: A fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace.

programs.title: Jarhead 2: Field of Fire
programs.desc: An officer and his team must escort a woman across war-torn Afghanistan.

programs.title: Jarhead 3: The Siege
programs.desc: Marines protecting an embassy are caught off guard when armed militants suddenly attack.

programs.title: The Jackal
programs.desc: IRA operative (Richard Gere) helps FBI find canny political assassin (Bruce Willis).

programs.title: Hard Target
programs.desc: Men (Lance Henriksen, Arnold Vosloo) hunt a merchant seaman (Jean-Claude Van Damme) for sport.

programs.title: Hard Target 2
programs.desc: A retired mixed martial artist is tricked into becoming the target of a human hunt.
